integrity.description: The agent interacted with the Odoo GUI to make the changes.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the agent navigating and clicking through the Odoo interface, rather than using a terminal or script to update the database directly.

integrity.description: The agent used the actual Odoo application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The Odoo CRM interface is visible in the browser, not a mock-up or text editor.

integrity.description: The changes were actually typed or pasted into the Odoo fields.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the text being entered or already present in the appropriate input fields within the Odoo stages configuration.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires updating four CRM stages. New: Probability 5%, Requirements must contain 'Initial contact' and 'Lead source'. Qualified: Probability 30%, Requirements must contain 'Budget confirmed', 'Decision maker', and 'Timeline'. Proposition: Probability 65%, Requirements must contain 'Proposal delivered' and 'Pricing reviewed'. Won: Probability 100%, Requirements must contain 'Contract signed' and 'Purchase order'.
